tastingDescription: 94 Points, Ultimate Spirits Challenge 2021: "This golden-hued Bourbon calls to mind butterscotch hard candies, blondie bars, toasted coconut, and sweet cream on the nose. tastingDescription: 93 Points, Ultimate Spirits Challenge 2022: "This whiskey kicks off with a boldly spicy nose of smoked paprika and Big Red gum. Those intense flavors expertly tempered by a healthy dose of sweet tasting oak vanillin and robust flavors of creamed corn." 1 bottle limit.

sort: EAGLE RARE KENTUCKY STRAIGHT BOURBON WHISKEY
tastingDescription: Eagle Rare Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey is masterfully crafted and carefully aged for no less than ten years. The rareness of this great breed of bourbon is evident in its complex aroma, as well as the smooth and lingering taste. Eagle Rare is a bourbon that lives up to its name with its lofty, distinctive taste experience. Nose: Complex aromas of toffee, hints of orange peel, herbs, honey, leather and oak. Taste: Bold, dry, oaky flavors with notes of candied almonds and very rich cocoa. Finish: Dry and lingering. 1 bottle limit.
name: EAGLE RARE KENTUCKY STRAIGHT BOURBON WHISKEY

tastingDescription: Gold, San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2022. The Original Wheated Bourbon Whiskey features an exceptionally smooth taste, substituting wheat for rye grain. Its softer flavour notes make this bourbon great for sipping or making cocktails. A sweet nose with a presence of caramel. Tasting notes of honey, butterscotch, and a soft woodiness. It's smooth, delicate and calm. Features a smooth finish with a sweet honeysuckle flair. 1 bottle limit.
